text.tspan: If you break one, you'll scramble the eggs, mask the pork, or split the sauce.
Never mask the natural pork fat and sharp
Pecorino with cream. Trust food chemistry —
Pasta starch water is the thermal stabilizer that
prevents scrambled eggs. A ladleful rescues any
Direct burner heat ruins the emulsion. Combine
yolk paste and pasta completely off the burner,
